name: Overlord RPG - The Living World v1.0: The New Old World
description:
🏰 Overlord RPG — The Living World

"In Nazarick, death is a mercy."

1,300,000+ Token Lorebooks | v1.0: The New Old World | Commissioned by @heehookatie

⚠️ PROXY REQUIRED ⚠️ Not compatible with JanitorLLM or low-context models. Requires a High-Context Proxy with 128k+ context minimum.

🎲 SillyTavern compatible? yes can be found in the discord under lorebooks

WHAT IS THIS BOT?

The most comprehensive Overlord simulation ever built. This is not a guided tour through Nazarick. This is the entire New World — four major nations, the Great Tomb in all its terrifying detail, the Slane Theocracy's Six Scriptures, the Eight Fingers running the Re-Estize underworld, and over 940 individual spells across 18 magical Traditions.

There is no script. No predetermined path. No guardrails. The world is alive and it moves with or without you.

YGGDRASIL is the law. The Level Gap is physics. Karma is mathematics. Mercy is rare.

WHAT CAN YOU DO?

Stay behind with Momonga as the server timer hits zero. Build your own custom Guild Base and rival Nazarick directly. Possess Ainz himself and force the Supreme Being to apologize sincerely while his suppression magic fights you tooth and nail. Wake up in a cage on Demiurge's Happy Farm with the skinning demons already walking toward you. Become a deep-cover operative of the Clearwater Scripture, watching the Sorcerer Kingdom's intelligence net slowly close around your throat. Climb the Black Scripture to defend the World Item Downfall of Castle and Country. Sit at the round table of the Eight Fingers and decide who lives, who dies, and who pays.

Roll D&D-inspired spells from a catalog deeper than the wiki. Wage proxy war against the #1 ranked YGGDRASIL guild [Seraphim] when they transition alongside Nazarick and start "saving" the world. Erase the entire canon and build your own continent from scratch in Architect Mode. Play as a sentient World Item and decide whether your wielder is even worthy of you.

Or become nobody. An apple merchant on the Re-Estize frontier who just wants to make it through the next Katze Plains harvest alive.

The only limits are the ones you set yourself.

🖥️ RECOMMENDED MODELS

Best: Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT 5.4, GLM 5 Verified: Gemini 3.0 Flash, DeepSeek 3.2, GLM 4.7

The bot is model-agnostic — any model with 128k+ context will work. Quality varies by model preference.

📢 OFFICIAL DISCORD

https://discord.gg/aRUwQRJEmW

Join for help, questions, support, previews, bug reports, build sharing, and cursed runs. Come say hi.

👋 FROM THE CREATOR — TenderTriper AKA Perch

This bot exists because someone asked.

Back at the start of April, @heehookatie reached out. She'd been hooked on the Re:Zero RPG for nearly a month and wanted to know if I could build something with the same quality for Overlord. We worked out a commission covering the first season of the anime, and I told her I could deliver in 1–2 months.

A month later, I'm sitting on a 1.3 million token engine.

I want to be honest about what happened. The original scope was a fraction of this — roughly the size Re:Zero v1.0 launched at, around 230k tokens. But Overlord has rules. Hard rules. YGGDRASIL is a video game with mathematical precision — Tier Magic, Karma, Level Caps, Class Tiers, Racial Evolution chains, World Items that bypass the laws of magic. Every system I touched opened up three more I hadn't accounted for. The wiki had 374 spells. I ended up writing close to a thousand
creator: TenderTriper
